name: Douyin · 端到端发布诊断
description: 完整流程：导航→头图→封面(1080x1440)→标题→正文→完成封面→发布→采集。最终验证用例，会真发一篇测试文章。

cover_image.description: 封面（推荐页展示用，3:4 竖图，≥1080x1440）

steps.script: (() => { const ti = document.querySelector('input[placeholder*="标题"]'); if (!ti) return 'no_title_input'; const setter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set; setter.call(ti, 'PROBE-E2E-DELETE-ME-' + Date.now().toString(36)); ti.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', {bubbles: true})); ti.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', {bubbles: true})); return 'ok'; })()

(() => { const e = document.querySelector('.editor-DoqDrA'); if (!e) return 'no_editor'; const f = Object.keys(e).find(k => k.startsWith('__reactFiber')); if (!f) return 'no_fiber'; let c = e[f], ed = null; for (let i = 0; i < 20 && c; i++) { const s = c.memoizedState; if (s) { let h = s; while (h) { const v = h.memoizedState; if (v && typeof v === 'object' && v.editor && v.editor.commands && typeof v.editor.commands.insertContent === 'function') { ed = v.editor; break; } h = h.next; } } if (ed) break; c = c.return; } if (!ed) return 'no_tiptap'; ed.commands.clearContent(); ed.commands.insertContent('

这是用于端到端验证抖音文章发布流程的探测性测试正文，请勿视为真实作品内容。本次验证将按新的 preset 流程跑完整链路：上传头图与独立的封面图（3:4 竖图）、填入标题与正文、点击封面编辑完成按钮、再点击底部发布按钮，最后采集 URL 与 toast 确认发布结果。

'); return 'ok'; })()
(() => { const icons = [...document.querySelectorAll('[class*=addIcon]')]; if (icons.length < 2) return 'only_' + icons.length; icons[1].setAttribute('data-ziniao-cover', '1'); return 'marked'; })()

(() => { const btns = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].filter(b => b.offsetWidth > 0 && (b.innerText || '').trim()).map(b => ({ text: (b.innerText || '').trim().slice(0, 30), y: Math.round(b.getBoundingClientRect().y), disabled: b.disabled })); const toasts = [...document.querySelectorAll('[class*=toast]')].filter(n => n.offsetWidth > 0 && (n.innerText || '').trim()).map(n => (n.innerText || '').trim().slice(0, 150)); return JSON.stringify({ btns, toasts }); })()

(() => { const modal = document.querySelector('.semi-modal-body, .semi-modal-content'); if (!modal) return 'no_modal'; const b = [...modal.querySelectorAll('button')].find(x => (x.innerText || '').trim() === '确定' && !x.disabled); if (!b) return 'no_confirm_btn'; const pk = Object.keys(b).find(k => k.startsWith('__reactProps')); if (pk && b[pk]?.onClick) { b[pk].onClick(); return 'confirm_clicked'; } b.click(); return 'confirm_native'; })()

(() => { const modals = [...document.querySelectorAll('[class*=semi-modal-body]')].filter(n => n.offsetWidth > 0 && n.offsetHeight > 0).map(n => (n.innerText || '').slice(0, 100)); return JSON.stringify({ modals_open: modals.length, modals }); })()

(() => { const btns = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].filter(e => (e.innerText || '').trim() === '发布' && e.offsetWidth > 0); const btn = btns[btns.length - 1]; if (!btn) return 'no_btn'; const pk = Object.keys(btn).find(k => k.startsWith('__reactProps')); if (pk && btn[pk]?.onClick) { btn[pk].onClick(); return 'clicked_publish'; } btn.click(); return 'fallback_click'; })()

(() => { const modals = [...document.querySelectorAll('[class*=semi-modal], [class*=Modal], [role="dialog"]')].filter(n => n.offsetWidth > 0 && n.offsetHeight > 0); const toasts = [...document.querySelectorAll('[class*=toast]')].filter(n => n.offsetWidth > 0 && (n.innerText || '').trim()).map(n => (n.innerText || '').trim().slice(0, 200)); return JSON.stringify({ url: location.href, url_changed: window.__probe_before !== location.href, modals: modals.map(n => ({ cls: n.className, inner_text: (n.innerText || '').slice(0, 300), btns: [...n.querySelectorAll('button')].map(b => (b.innerText || '').trim().slice(0, 30)) })), toasts }); })()
